domain_source: Inferred from Plausible data-domain in base templates and verified with production curl checks.
recommended_django_seo_app: apps/pages or a future apps/seo module
notes: The seo-sprint skill does not include a native Django adapter, so the roadmap records Django-specific paths and treats markdown fallback content as a temporary generation format until Phase 0 adds a Django renderer.

Ahrefs MCP was unavailable during initialization. Keyword volume, KD, and traffic potential values in .seo/keyword-research.json are estimated and should be refreshed with Ahrefs, Semrush, or GSC data before deep page work.
Production sitemap and robots are already reachable at the configured domain.
